01.title: V-CLos Project
01.desc: V-CLos is a 3DCG live production collective spearheaded by students of Senzoku Gakuen College of Music, dedicated to pursuing the next generation of entertainment.

02.title: REAL × VIRTUAL
02.desc: Our paramount strength lies in the synergy between the 'power of live performance,' inherent to a college of music, and the 'practical application of 3DCG technology' leveraging on-campus motion capture facilities.

03.title: STUDENT CREATION
03.desc: From conceptualization and musical performance to visual production and dance motion, everything is meticulously crafted by the hands of students. Starting with the 'VOCA-Fes Series,' we broadcast a unique paradigm of fan-made live concerts that only we can actualize.

whoWeAre.title: WHO WE ARE
whoWeAre.p1: V-CLos is a 3DCG live production collective driven by the students of Senzoku Gakuen College of Music, exploring the next generation of entertainment.
whoWeAre.p2: Our goal is to create a one-of-a-kind virtual experience that fuses the <highlight>"overwhelming passion of live performance"</highlight> only possible at a music college with <highlight>"cutting-edge 3DCG technology"</highlight> utilizing a motion capture system.
whoWeAre.p3: From planning to performance, sound design, CG motion, and visual direction, everything is created by the students’ own hands, continuing to broadcast innovative expressions that only we can achieve.

vocaFes.p1: "VOCA-Fes Series" is the flagship live project brought to you by the combined forces of V-CLos.
vocaFes.p2: At its core lies our <underline>"absolute dedication to live performance"</underline>. In VOCA-Fes, real-time band performances generate an enthusiastic groove.
vocaFes.p3: This series is also the <highlight>"culmination of our research"</highlight>. Under the theme of "a different technical challenge for every performance", we open up new possibilities for fan-made live shows.

team.title: TEAM STRUCTURE

performance.name: Performance Team
performance.desc: Responsible for band performance, manipulation (control of synchronized sound sources), and lead sheet (score) production.

sound.name: Sound Team
sound.desc: Responsible for sequence production (programming) and vocal tuning.

visual.name: Visual Team
visual.desc: Responsible for dance capture of student actors using the on-campus motion capture system, 3D motion production, and background visuals (VJ).

pr.name: PR Team
pr.desc: Plans and executes PR strategies to promote our live performances.

team.footer:
In addition to these internal sections of V-CLos, by establishing a cooperative system with student staff (lighting and sound) outside the project,

we bring together campus resources and balance academic research with on-site technology.

mission.label: MISSION
mission.text:
Fully utilizing our strengths as a music college

to create new experiences.

contact.text:
For questions and requests regarding V-CLos activities,

please contact us via the CONTACT page.
